rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal's cost of living, tourism, or Iberian climate risks; Iran deal stalemate continues without energy price relief.

top_events.title: Iran deal stalemate: no breakthrough, contradictory signals persist
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal uncertainty means no relief on global energy prices, keeping indirect pressure on Portuguese household costs and EU economic outlook.

top_events.title: Ebola spreads into new areas of DR Congo
top_events.summary: Ebola's geographic expansion in DRC is distant from Portugal with no direct impact, but EU-level health response could have minor administrative implications.

top_events.title: Ukraine doubles logistics strikes on Russia
top_events.summary: Ukraine's intensified campaign is geographically distant from Portugal; indirect effect only if it shifts EU energy or defense spending dynamics.
